completed_tasks.description:
Research and analysis required for implementing: "Migrate files/parse route test from vi.doMock() to bun-compatible enhanced infrastructure"

**Implementation Task Details:**
Migrate /Users/jeremyparker/Desktop/Claude Coding Projects/sim/apps/sim/app/api/files/parse/route.test.ts from vi.doMock() pattern to bun-compatible enhanced infrastructure using migration template. Preserve all existing comprehensive security tests and file parsing logic. Apply proven pattern: module mocks first, enhanced-utils, route handlers. Replace vi.doMock() with vi.mock() factory functions. Use mockControls for runtime config. Ensure proper cleanup and test isolation.
